summary: Completed the bounded SpecBridge v2 release-readiness hardening phase for issue #260. Claude Code ran first and produced the main v2 implementation with 231 local tests passing. Codex reviewed the result, found and fixed a weak unicode-escaped-property test fixture, removed destructive reset guidance from rollback docs, aligned the v2 contract, reran validations, committed, pushed, and verified GitHub Actions CI. The v2 commit 1c1def8aa349fa896100bc395702b764c1ede355 was pushed to origin/master and CI run 28145621712 passed.

policy_result: Within the dedicated issue #260 contract. The work did not access secrets, install dependencies, change production configuration, billing, authentication, authorization, databases, deployment automation, hosted runtimes, external AI providers, mutation-capable MCP tools, repository visibility, CI workflow security, force push, branch deletion, or remote deletion. The only remote mutation after local validation was the authorized normal non-force push to specbridge-v2 origin/master and GitHub CI/status reads.
risk_result: Medium-risk static-validator hardening was bounded to declared v2 files and additive tests/docs/evidence. The validator now handles unicode-escaped JSON property names in array-field syntax checks, rejects rooted or parent-traversal forbidden_paths entries, and rejects operation names with surrounding whitespace while preserving existing exit codes and report fields.
unresolved_risks: The v1 evidence branch is not merged into main.
specbridge-v2 master remains unprotected because branch protection is blocked by the previously recorded GitHub plan/private visibility limitation.
Runtime operation enforcement remains future scope; v2 validates manifests but does not execute or sandbox operations.
CI still uses actions/checkout@v4 rather than a SHA-pinned action because CI workflow hardening is blocked without a dedicated CI workflow contract.
merge_status: v2 master updated by normal non-force push. No autonomous merge into v1 main was performed; v1 evidence remains on branch codex/issue-255-serious-product-build-pilot and requires PR, CI, review, and explicit operator merge authority.
deployment_status: Not applicable. No deployment was requested or performed.
